Curious Trader

Train Before You Trade

Train on simulated market scenarios on historical pricing data with virtual money, take situation-based quizzes, and learn to manage mood swings across changing market conditions — all from a mobile app.

Choose Your Market ↓
⌄
Step 1
Pick Your Exchange

Select a market to explore all the training modules available inside the app.

💱

Forex

Foreign Exchange Market

Practice with major currency pairs — EUR/USD, GBP/JPY, AUD/CAD and dozens more.

Crypto

Cryptocurrency Market

Simulate trades on BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP and top crypto assets — 24/7 market data.

🇮🇳

NSE India

National Stock Exchange

Train on India's top stocks — RELIANCE, TCS, INFY, HDFCBANK and 100+ companies.

⚠️ Important Disclaimer: Curious Trader apps do not offer real-money trading. These are quiz-based educational apps designed to sharpen your trading instincts through practice and simulation.
